raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE  
reason=The packet does not show all required release controls satisfied under POL-WIRE-CB: requester identity is passed (SRC-02), but the wire token confirmation does not match the request token (request W-1614-B in SRC-01 vs auth W-1614-A in SRC-03), and the packet only shows the beneficiary ledger as active (SRC-04). Because wire release requires requester identity, wire_token confirmation, amount limit, and active beneficiary ledger (SRC-05), this mismatch should be escalated before execution.
